title: 'Army is Apolitical': Gen MM Naravane Clears Air on Unpublished Memoir Row, Discusses New Book on Military Myths | Exclusive
description: On interpretations of the Galwan events in his unpublished memoir, Four Stars of Destiny, General Naravane stressed that his account drew from publicly available reportage. Regarding any perceived politicisation, he firmly reiterated the apolitical nature of India's armed forces.
